Proceedings of the 3rd International Conference on Economics, Management, Law and Education (EMLE 2017)

# The Impact of Characteristics of Regional Innovation Network Structure on Regional Innovation Output

This paper constructs the evaluation system of structural characteristics of regional innovation network, analyzes the influence mechanism of the regional characteristics of six dimensions of regional innovation network on regional innovation capability by regression analysis through the data of relevant statistical yearbooks. The results show that the network size, network structure, the openness of the network, and the strong and weak connection of the network have a significant positive effect on the regional innovation capability. However, the network concentration does not exert the required diffusion effect on growth pole and has no obvious effect on enhancing the innovation capability.

[Download article (PDF)](https://www.atlantis-press.com/article/25888347.pdf)

enriched_points.expanded_content: Diverse regional traits, such as cultural, natural, and infrastructural resources, significantly influence innovation activities and effectiveness, fostering knowledge exploitation and R&D initiatives.
Effective R&D tax incentives enhance investment in innovation, encouraging firms to increase their research activities, which in turn stimulates economic growth and competitiveness.

enriched_points.point_title: Innovation Clusters Are Vital for Growth
enriched_points.expanded_content: Concentrated networks of innovation foster collaboration, knowledge sharing, and resource access, driving regional economic development and enhancing the overall innovation capacity within those clusters.
